reasoning: All flagged unsafe findings are false positives: Windows installer.iss is irrelevant for Linux builds; install/uninstall.run scripts aren't executed during makepkg; mismatched app name is benign.
disagreement_analysis: qwen overreacted to unused files (installer.iss) and standard install/uninstall scripts not executed during makepkg.
coverage_issues: qwen missed critical LAN sync code in budget_sync.py during full audit
false_positives: installer.iss: Windows-only file irrelevant for AUR builds
uninstall.run: Mismatched app name is typo, not malice
install.run: chmod +x on .desktop is poor practice but not malicious
learnings: Prioritize files referenced in PKGBUILD functions
Improve handling of privilege escalation in standard scripts
Enforce consistent review of network/filesystem access points
